name: event-ledger
description: Event Ledger is a two-service take-home project for processing financial transaction events from upstream systems that can deliver duplicates and out-of-order events.

scripts.render:diagrams: mmdc -p docs/diagrams/puppeteer-config.json -i docs/diagrams/c4-context.mmd -o docs/diagrams/c4-context.svg && mmdc -p docs/diagrams/puppeteer-config.json -i docs/diagrams/c4-container.mmd -o docs/diagrams/c4-container.svg && mmdc -p docs/diagrams/puppeteer-config.json -i docs/diagrams/c4-component-gateway.mmd -o docs/diagrams/c4-component-gateway.svg && mmdc -p docs/diagrams/puppeteer-config.json -i docs/diagrams/c4-component-account-service.mmd -o docs/diagrams/c4-component-account-service.svg
